name: Gold & Silver Pawn Shop
description_short: World-famous pawn shop featured on History's 'Pawn Stars,' offering collateral-based loans, precious metals, collectibles, and memorabilia with expert authentication.
description_long:
Gold & Silver Pawn Shop was founded in 1988 by Rick Harrison with support from his Navy veteran father. What began as a single store has grown into an internationally recognized business, propelled to fame through the History Channel's 'Pawn Stars' television series. The shop operates both as a physical retail location in Las Vegas and as an e-commerce platform serving customers worldwide.

The shop offers traditional pawn services including collateral-based loans, gold and precious metals buying, and the sale of authenticated collectibles. Their inventory spans coins and currency, fine art, championship rings, sports memorabilia, autographs, jewelry, arms and armor, and fossils. The company emphasizes expert authentication across all product categories and maintains a buyer protection guarantee. They also offer meet-and-greet experiences with the show's personalities and merchandise branded with the shop's logo.

Gold & Silver Pawn Shop distinguishes itself through media prominence and brand recognition tied to the 'Pawn Stars' television program. The website showcases named personalities (Rick, Corey, Chumlee, and the Old Man), creating customer familiarity. Their e-commerce platform operates internationally with multi-currency and multi-language support across dozens of countries. The business combines traditional pawn shop functions with curated retail merchandise, premium collectibles sales, and experiential customer engagement.

As a pawn shop, the company primarily serves customers seeking short-term collateral loans or those wanting to sell items to a vetted buyer. The high-end nature of their inventory and celebrity association means transactions likely skew toward valuables rather than emergency cash needs. While the website emphasizes expert vetting and buyer protection, typical pawn shop limitations apply: loan terms depend on collateral value, and customers should verify specific APR/fee structures before pledging items.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Expert authentication across all product categories (coins, art, memorabilia, jewelry, armor)
International e-commerce reach with multi-currency support across 75+ countries and regions
Buyer protection guarantee explicitly stated on website
Meet-and-greet experiences available with show personalities during shop visits
Curated high-end inventory including championship rings, signed memorabilia, and fine art
Free shipping on most items within the USA
Transparent pricing displayed on website with regular sales and promotions
cons: Website does not clearly disclose loan APR, terms, or fee structure for pawn loans
Physical pawn services may require in-person visit to Las Vegas location; remote appraisal options not mentioned
Inventory heavily weighted toward high-value collectibles rather than accessible quick cash options
USPS shipping delays noted on website; expedited options (UPS/FedEx) require paid upgrade
No information provided about loan-to-value ratios, repayment terms, or default consequences
best_for: Collectors and enthusiasts seeking authenticated rare items (coins, memorabilia, fine art, championship rings)
Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, gold, sports memorabilia) to sell or pawn quickly
International customers shopping for collectibles across 75+ countries with currency flexibility
Fans of the 'Pawn Stars' television show seeking branded merchandise or meet-and-greet experiences
diagnosis: Gold & Silver Pawn Shop is best for customers with valuable items to sell or pledge as collateral, and for collectors seeking authenticated high-end memorabilia, coins, and jewelry. The primary caveat is that this is a specialty pawn shop focused on valuables rather than emergency lending—customers should not expect quick cash for low-value items, and specific loan terms (APR, repayment period, loan-to-value ratio) are not disclosed online and must be inquired about directly.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on authenticated valuables
Purchase and sale of precious metals (gold, silver)
Coin and currency authentication and sales
Fine art acquisition and sales with expert vetting
Championship ring sales across sports categories
E-commerce fulfillment with domestic and international shipping
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 713 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89101
